business_quality: Optical networking supplier leveraged to AI and datacenter demand, with improving product mix and margin recovery.
growth_durability: Moderate to high if hyperscaler and datacenter demand keeps compounding into 800G and 1.6T adoption.
key_risks: Customer concentration, cyclical optics demand, manufacturing execution, and margin sensitivity to mix shifts.
valuation_context: More cyclical and component-driven than the others, but also easier to justify on nearer-term operating results.
notes: AAOI score inputs are the cleanest in the group because the Q4 2025 release disclosed enough operating detail for normalization.
